sourceMovie.title: Project Gutenberg
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Project Gutenberg works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The International
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Project Gutenberg clicked for you, The International (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and crime, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Project Gutenberg?
faq.answer: Try The International, Absolution, Welcome to the Punch—each shares DNA with Project Gutenberg while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Project Gutenberg?
faq.answer: Project Gutenberg (2018) is best described as Action, Crime, Mystery. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Project Gutenberg worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
